criteriaResults.criterion: Task cards show grab cursor on hover
criteriaResults.evidence: CSS classes cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing in TaskCard.tsx line 52

criteriaResults.criterion: Dragging task shows visual feedback (reduced opacity on source card)
criteriaResults.evidence: handleDragStart adds opacity-50, handleDragEnd removes it (lines 33-41)
draggable attribute enables browser native drag preview (line 49)

criteriaResults.criterion: Drop zones highlight when dragging task over valid column
criteriaResults.evidence: isDragOver state applies ring-2 ring-blue-500 classes (KanbanColumn.tsx lines 24-52)

criteriaResults.criterion: Dropping task moves it to new column immediately
criteriaResults.evidence: handleDrop dispatches MOVE_TASK, reducer updates status synchronously (verified by E2E)

criteriaResults.criterion: Task appears at bottom of target column after drop
criteriaResults.evidence: Tasks render via tasks.map() preserving array order

criteriaResults.criterion: Column task counts update after move
criteriaResults.evidence: Badge shows tasks.length, useMemo recalculates on state change

criteriaResults.criterion: Task status in DataContext updates to match column
criteriaResults.evidence: MOVE_TASK sets task.status to newStatus (DataContext.tsx lines 70-78)

criteriaResults.criterion: Moved task position persists after page refresh
criteriaResults.evidence: useEffect syncs to localStorage, E2E test verifies persistence (lines 69-94)

criteriaResults.criterion: Invalid drop (outside columns) returns card to original position
criteriaResults.evidence: Only columns have handleDrop; no action dispatched on invalid drop

criteriaResults.criterion: Drag works correctly in both light and dark modes
criteriaResults.evidence: All styles use Tailwind dark: variants
HTML5 DnD has limited native touch support (known platform limitation)
All smoke tests pass (3/3), no console errors

e2eResults.notes: 8 failures are pre-existing config issue in task-7.1-validation.spec.ts (wrong port 5174 vs 5173), not regressions from Task 13

handoff.handoffNotes: All acceptance criteria pass. Task 13 successfully implements drag-and-drop with persistence. All new E2E tests pass (5/5). Zero functional regressions introduced. Touch support is limited by HTML5 DnD API as expected. Pre-existing test config issue in task-7.1-validation.spec.ts is unrelated to this task.
